相信警隊用Cellebrite嚟破解，即係FBI曾經用過嘅以色列公司。
佢哋今年8月已經有篇文寫咗破解到Telegram chat甚至TG密碼，所以手機都無嘢係安全。

Why Decoding the iOS Telegram App is Critical to Investigations

The Telegram mobile app is used by more than 200 million active users every month. But with features like secret chats and end-to-end encryption, Telegram has also proven to be a fertile ground for criminal activity.

Cellebrite supports digital data extraction from Telegram for investigators to gain insight into a suspect’s everyday activity – including their contacts, chats, channels, calls, locations and even the passwords used to lock the app. This wealth of digital data can prove invaluable during investigations needing incriminating or conclusive evidence. To learn more, check out our Insights paper here.

In UFED Physical Analyzer version 7.19, we provided decoding support for important digital artifacts including user account information and contacts within Telegram. In later releases we added chat messages and in the latest 7.22 release, we extended support for new attachment types.

https://www.cellebrite.com/en/blog/why-decoding-the-ios-telegram-app-is-critical-to-investigations/
DKLM

replies.msg:
其實個SMS唔需要截取，只要你部電話喺人哋手上，你重知道佢個電話號碼就得喇，個流程係咁

首先進入telegram網頁版，打個電話號碼，部iphone收到SMS，個mon會自動著mon彈出個SMS notification，之後打個SMS就可以直入

所以比較好嘅做法係喺telegram set additional password，可能佢冇set到，剩係手機password係冇用的，因為可以用我上面個方法直入，至於whatsapp就唔知喇

quote.msg: factory reset係唔係可以delete d 相呀個人資料個d?

replies.msg:
reset完，落啲av入去打爆個容量，再reset多次

因為電腦delete嘢為咗增加hdd嘅壽命，係唔會立即delete

例如delete文件：i go to school by bus
係唔會立即變為：0000000000000000
因為硬碟嘅合金形狀改變次數係有限
如果下次再喺同一個位記嘢：i want to buy a apple
咁就將個硬碟改變咗兩次
咁電腦設計者就諗：不如就標記i go to school by bus為不要文件，唔改佢住，將呢個區域標為可覆寫區域
下次要改就直接變成i want to buy a apple
咁就變一次就得，同埋開始文字都係i，喺呢格直頭唔洗變添

啲數據修復程式就係搵返呢啲標記住「不要」嘅文件出嚟
鎖卡都可以拎到電話內儲

相信警隊用Cellebrite嚟破解，即係FBI曾經用過嘅以色列公司。
佢哋今年8月已經有篇文寫咗破解到Telegram chat甚至TG密碼，所以手機都無嘢係安全。

Why Decoding the iOS Telegram App is Critical to Investigations

The Telegram mobile app is used by more than 200 million active users every month. But with features like secret chats and end-to-end encryption, Telegram has also proven to be a fertile ground for criminal activity.

Cellebrite supports digital data extraction from Telegram for investigators to gain insight into a suspect’s everyday activity – including their contacts, chats, channels, calls, locations and even the passwords used to lock the app. This wealth of digital data can prove invaluable during investigations needing incriminating or conclusive evidence. To learn more, check out our Insights paper here.

In UFED Physical Analyzer version 7.19, we provided decoding support for important digital artifacts including user account information and contacts within Telegram. In later releases we added chat messages and in the latest 7.22 release, we extended support for new attachment types.

https://www.cellebrite.com/en/blog/why-decoding-the-ios-telegram-app-is-critical-to-investigations/

quote.msg: 之前吹到fbi都破解唔到

replies.msg:
FBI / 警方都係唔會破解到
佢地只係用高價搵啲破解公司搞
破唔破到有好多因素，包括時間，iOS版本，手機型號，手機狀況等等

當年FBI 開頭搵唔到方法破，搵法院出order 要Apple 配合
但Apple 只可以提供iCloud 上有嘅野，例如icloud backup 嘅content
而當年部機個iCloud backup 係唔update, apple 提無左個方法，叫FBI 攞部機入返嗰條友間屋，有known WiFi 叉住電就會auto backup
但FBI自己7下7下咁一早想reset 條友個iCloud password, 搞過個iCloud account 令到部機唔再auto backup

最後FBI 要求 Apple 寫一個有backdoor嘅iOS 版本，但Apple 拒絕，正當要打官司之際，FBI就搵到間公司幫佢破

所以今日破唔到唔代表幾個月後破唔到，尤其是iOS 越舊，破解成本越低（因為舊iOS exploit 較唔值錢）
